description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with golang:latest as the default image and three stages: compile, package, and deploy_test. Add a global before_script that runs "ln -s /builds /go/src/gitlab.com" and then "cd /go/src/gitlab.com/goern/oe2k". In the compile stage define a compile job that executes "go get -u github.com/Masterminds/glide", "make vendoring", and "make", and publishes the binaries bin/oe2k, bin/build-finder, bin/buildlog2hdfs, bin/rest-gw, and bin/git-enricher as artifacts. In the package stage add four jobs—build:build-finder-image, build:event-pubisher-image, build:git-enricher-image, and build:rest-gw-image—each using the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service, a before_script that logs in to registry.gitlab.com with "docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com", a script that builds the respective Dockerfile (Dockerfile.build-finder, Dockerfile.oe2k, Dockerfile.git-enricher, Dockerfile.rest-gw) tagging it as registry.gitlab.com/goern/oe2k/<name>:latest and pushes it, and an after_script that logs out with "docker logout registry.gitlab.com". Finally, in the deploy_test stage add a deploy_test job that runs in the test environment and runs "echo \"Deploy to 'test' environment\"". No caches or conditional rules are defined.
